---
title: '2014/05/12 Journal First Day New Job'
date: '2014-05-22T11:27:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '765563598634208706'
blogger_filename: '/2014/05/20140512-journal-first-day-new-job.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<p>I feel like a high school freshman. Or maybe like I did when I was a Jr leaving Break for La Quinta. New building, new systems, same rough idea of environment, higher level. </p>
